trans-unit.source: Creating dump file '{0}'
trans-unit.target: 正在建立傾印檔案 '{0}'
trans-unit.note: {0} is the dump file path.

trans-unit.source: Dumping process {0} - {1}
trans-unit.target: 傾印處理序 {0} - {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is the name of the process

trans-unit.source: Dumping this process tree (from bottom):
trans-unit.target: 正在傾印此處理序樹狀結構 (從底部):

trans-unit.source: Error getting parent of process {0} - {1}: {2}"
trans-unit.target: 取得 {0} - {1} 的父處理序時發生錯誤: {2}"
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is name, 2 is the exception

trans-unit.source: Error while killing process {0} - {1}: {2}
trans-unit.target: 終止處理序 {0} - {1} 時發生錯誤: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is name, 2 is the exception

trans-unit.source: Error while taking dump of process {0} - {1}: {2}
trans-unit.target: 擷取處理序 {0} - {1} 的傾印時發生錯誤: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is name, 2 is the exception from the system

trans-unit.source: The hang dump file
trans-unit.target: 擱置傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: Hang dump file
trans-unit.target: 擱置傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: Environment variable '{0}' is set to '{1}' instead of '{2}'
trans-unit.target: 環境變數 '{0}' 已設定為 '{1}' 而不是 '{2}'
trans-unit.note: {0} is the environment variable name. {1} is the actual value. {2} is the expected value.

trans-unit.source: Environment variable '{0}' is not set
trans-unit.target: 未設定環境變數 '{0}'
trans-unit.note: {0} is the environment variable name.

trans-unit.source: Produce hang dump files when a test execution exceed a given time.
trans-unit.target: 當測試執行超過指定時間時，產生擱置傾印檔案。

trans-unit.source: Hang dump
trans-unit.target: 擱置傾印

trans-unit.note: {0} is the exception that occurred. {1} is disk information detailing free space.

trans-unit.source: Specify the name of the dump file. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {arch} (process architecture), {time} (timestamp). The legacy %p token (process ID) is also supported for backward compatibility.
trans-unit.target: Specify the name of the dump file. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {arch} (process architecture), {time} (timestamp). The legacy %p token (process ID) is also supported for backward compatibility.
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump-filename"}, placeholder tokens {Locked="{pname}"}{Locked="{pid}"}{Locked="{asm}"}{Locked="{tfm}"}{Locked="{arch}"}{Locked="{time}"}, or legacy token {Locked="%p"}.

trans-unit.source: Generate a dump file if the test process hangs
trans-unit.target: 如果測試程序擱置，則產生傾印檔案
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump"}.

trans-unit.source: Hang dump timeout of '{0}' expired
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 的擱置傾印逾時已過期
trans-unit.note: {0} is the hang dump timeout value.

trans-unit.source: Specify the timeout after which the dump will be generated. The timeout value is specified in one of the following formats: 500ms, 500mil, 500millisecond, 500milliseconds, 5400s, 5400sec, 5400second, 5400seconds, 90m, 90min, 90minute, 90minutes, 1.5h, 1.5hour, 1.5hours, 1d, 1day, 1days. A bare number (with no suffix) is interpreted as milliseconds. Default is 30m.
trans-unit.target: 指定產生傾印前的逾時時間。 以下列其中一種格式指定逾時值: 500ms, 500mil, 500millisecond, 500milliseconds, 5400s, 5400sec, 5400second, 5400seconds, 90m, 90min, 90minute, 90minutes, 1.5h, 1.5hour, 1.5hours, 1d, 1day, 1days. 裸數 (沒有後置詞) 會解譯為毫秒。 預設為 30m。
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump-timeout"} or time examples {Locked="500ms"}{Locked="500mil"}{Locked="500millisecond"}{Locked="500milliseconds"}{Locked="5400s"}{Locked="5400sec"}{Locked="5400second"}{Locked="5400seconds"}{Locked="90m"}{Locked="90min"}{Locked="90minute"}{Locked="90minutes"}{Locked="1.5h"}{Locked="1.5hour"}{Locked="1.5hours"}{Locked="1d"}{Locked="1day"}{Locked="1days"}{Locked="30m"}.

trans-unit.source: '--hangdump-timeout' expects a single timeout argument
trans-unit.target: '--hangdump-timeout' 需要單一逾時引數
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump-timeout"}.

trans-unit.source: '--hangdump-type' and '--hangdump-type-if-supported' are mutually exclusive. Use '--hangdump-type-if-supported' to opt into a best-effort dump type that falls back to the closest available type (with an informational message) when the requested type is unavailable on the current runtime, or '--hangdump-type' to fail fast on unsupported runtimes.
trans-unit.target: '--hangdump-type' 與 '--hangdump-type-if-supported' 互斥。使用 '--hangdump-type-if-supported' 以選擇最佳的傾印類型，該類型會在要求的類型無法用於目前執行階段時退回至最接近的可用類型 (包含資訊訊息)，或使用 '--hangdump-type' 以在不支援的執行階段快速檢錯。
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option names {Locked="--hangdump-type"}{Locked="--hangdump-type-if-supported"}.

trans-unit.source: '--hangdump-type-if-supported {0}' is not supported on the current runtime. Falling back to '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: 目前執行階段不支援 '--hangdump-type-if-supported {0}'。退回至 '{1}'。
trans-unit.note: 0 is the requested dump type. 1 is the fallback dump type. Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump-type-if-supported"}.

trans-unit.source: Same as '--hangdump-type' but silently falls back (with an informational message) to the closest supported dump type when the requested type is not available on the current runtime (e.g. 'Triage' is only supported on .NET Core and falls back to 'Mini' on .NET Framework). Use this option to keep the same command line across CI matrices that mix .NET Framework and .NET. Valid values are 'Mini', 'Heap', 'Full', 'Triage', 'None'. Mutually exclusive with '--hangdump-type'.
trans-unit.target: 與 '--hangdump-type' 相同，但是當要求的類型無法用於目前執行階段時會以無訊息方式 (包含資訊訊息) 退回至最接近的支援傾印類型 (例如，'Triage' 僅在 .NET Core 上提供支援，而在 .NET Framework 上會退回至 'Mini')。使用此選項，在混合 .NET Framework 和 .NET 的 CI 矩陣當中保持相同的命令列。有效值為 'Mini'、'Heap'、'Full'、'Triage'、'None'。與 '--hangdump-type' 互斥。
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option names {Locked="--hangdump-type"}{Locked="--hangdump-type-if-supported"}, dump type values {Locked="Mini"}{Locked="Heap"}{Locked="Full"}{Locked="Triage"}{Locked="None"}, or runtime names {Locked=".NET Core"}{Locked=".NET Framework"}{Locked=".NET"}.

trans-unit.source: Specify the type of the dump. Valid values are {0}. Default type is 'Full'
trans-unit.target: 指定傾印的類型。 有效值 {0}。 預設類型為 'Full'
trans-unit.note: 0 is the list of valid dump type values. Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump-type"} or default dump type {Locked="Full"}.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a valid dump type. Valid options are {1}
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 不是有效的傾印類型。 有效的選項為 {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the invalid dump type. {1} is the list of valid dump type values.

trans-unit.source: Request of type '{0}' is not supported
trans-unit.target: 不支援類型 '{0}' 的要求
trans-unit.note: {0} is the unsupported request type name.

trans-unit.source: The list of tests that were running at the time of the hang
trans-unit.target: 擱置時正在執行的測試清單

trans-unit.source: Hang test list
trans-unit.target: 擱置測試清單

trans-unit.source: You specified one or more hang dump parameters but did not enable it, add --hangdump to the command line
trans-unit.target: 您指定了一或多個停留傾印參數但並未加以啟用，請將 --hangdump 新增至命令列中
trans-unit.note: Do not localize option name {Locked="--hangdump"}.

trans-unit.source: The following tests were still running when dump was taken (format: [<time-elapsed-since-start>] <name>):
trans-unit.target: 執行傾印時，下列測試仍在執行 (格式: [<time-elapsed-since-start>] <name>):
trans-unit.note: Do not localize format tokens {Locked="[<time-elapsed-since-start>]"} and {Locked="<name>"}.
